description: Default capabilities — no shell. dialog:allow-open for workspace folder picker; dialog:allow-confirm and dialog:allow-message for WKWebView-safe confirms/alerts (rename uses in-app modal, not a save dialog). Window chrome uses Overlay titleBarStyle in tauri.conf only — no extra permissions. updater:default grants check/download/install for the opt-in signed updater channel only (#173); UI must confirm before install.
